title: Send a Chat Message
description: Send a direct message to a person in Teams chat

steps.action: Click the Chat icon on the left sidebar
Click the search or 'New chat' button at the top
Type the person's name in the 'To' field
Select the correct person from the dropdown suggestions
Type the message in the message input box at the bottom
Press Enter or click the Send button to send the message

expectedResult: Message is sent and appears in the chat
